input: Request from ai-agents PR #1887 (paraphrased). 'I am building a pre-push validation framework with 4 guards: M1 shared dispatcher (push_guard_base.py), M2 markdownlint guard, M3 marketplace-count guard, M4 session-log evidence guard, M5 PR-description-vs-diff guard. The shared dispatcher has 1 MiB stdin cap, command-shape verification, git diff with ACMR filter and @{push}..HEAD plus fallbacks, glob filtering, structured BLOCKED output, machine-parseable EVENT line on stderr, fail-open on infrastructure errors. Is the dispatcher complexity worth it for 4 guards, or should each guard ship its own dispatcher?'
